editionData.title: June 7, 2026: Iran launched missiles and drones toward Strait of Hormuz, U.S. military says; Pope Leo visits a polarized Spain where...

So is her opponent). Markets leaned lower, with 7 of 7 tracked indexes down; NASDAQ Composite down 4.18% was the largest move. Benchmarks tracked: S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, Euronext 100 Index, and Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS plus 3 more indexes. Hacker News: An Ohio Valley 100k-Watt FM Signal Is Severed in Broad Daylight – Radio World (A daytime copper theft has knocked 100,000-watt WDGG(FM) in Ashland, Ky., off the air. Kindred Communications' Mike Kirtner details the...); Tokenomics: Quantifying Where Tokens Are Used in Agentic Software Engineering (LLM-based Multi-Agent (LLM-MA) systems are increasingly applied to automate complex software engineering tasks such as requirements...); and Ntsc-rs – open-source video emulation of analog TV and VHS artifacts (ntsc-rs is a free, open-source VHS and analog TV video effect. Use it online in your browser, as a standalone application, or as a plugin...). Product Hunt features Google Search Profiles (Profile for publishers/creators to highlight work on Search), Manus Shopify Connector (Build and manage Shopify stores from one chat), and Gaming services by IFTTT (Level up the way you play with Steam, Dota 2, and more).
editionData.author: Sony Mathew

headlines.title: Iran launched missiles and drones toward Strait of Hormuz, U.S. military says
headlines.summary: U.S. forces shot down Iranian missiles and drones launched toward the strait and neighboring countries.

headlines.title: Pope Leo visits a polarized Spain where conservatives are turning on the church
headlines.summary: On the first papal visit to Spain in 15 years, Leo plans to address political polarization and showcase the Catholic Church as an advocate for migrants and asylum seekers.

headlines.title: Fourth time could be the charm for Keiko Fujimori, Peru’s most polarizing politician
headlines.summary: The daughter of disgraced former president Alberto Fujimori, running again for the presidency, is herself deeply unpopular. So is her opponent.

headlines.title: Brazil, 24 years from a World Cup title, looks to a foreigner to rediscover its soul
headlines.summary: The Italian Carlo Ancelotti, the most decorated club coach in soccer history, is the first foreigner to lead the most successful nation.

headlines.title: Xi to visit North Korea, showing China’s importance to a nuclear-armed neighbor
headlines.summary: The summit comes as China positions itself as a global power player projecting stability in contrast to the U.S.'s economically damaging war against Iran and erratic tariff policies.

headlines.title: Israel kills Lebanon general; Arab nations slam attacks on Kuwait, Bahrain
headlines.summary: Israeli forces kill three high-ranking Lebanese soldiers as Arab nations condemn Iran's attacks on Bahrain and Kuwait.

headlines.title: Trump pardons former US Congress member accused of insider trading
headlines.summary: Republican Stephen Buyer was convicted and sentenced to 22 months in prison, though he has maintained his innocence.

headlines.title: Pentagon said to raise threat level on Israel spying to ‘critical’
headlines.summary: Department reports raise concerns about increased espionage activity amid US-Israeli war with Iran, ceasefire talks.

headlines.title: Rights group says drone strike kills 11 in central Sudan market
headlines.summary: Emergency Lawyers said dozens were also wounded in the strike that came less than 24 hours after similar drone attacks.

headlines.title: US doctor recovers from Ebola in Germany as DRC cases surge to 488
headlines.summary: Berlin's Charite hospital hailed treatment as a 'significant therapeutic success' as outbreak spreads in DR Congo.

headlines.title: SoFi Stadium workers vote to authorize strike ahead of World Cup
headlines.summary: Negotiations between the union representing the workers, the hospitality group at the Los Angeles stadium and FIFA are set to continue Monday.

headlines.title: Why one historian uses social media to remember D-Day in real time
headlines.summary: At the National World War II Memorial, historian Alex Kershaw has found an unlikely way to keep D-Day alive: live social media posts timed to the events of June 6, 1944.

headlines.title: Who will face Karen Bass? LA voters still waiting to find out
headlines.summary: Results are still coming in from the mayoral primary in Los Angeles. LAist reporter Frank Stoltze discusses who may emerge to face Karen Bass in November.

headlines.title: Israel has reportedly used white phosphorus near Lebanese cities and towns. What is it?
headlines.summary: White phosphorus is not banned under international law, but can "create cruel injuries" and indiscriminate harm in civilian areas.

headlines.title: Pope Leo says war with Iran is not a 'just war'
headlines.summary: Pope Leo XIV said the war in Iran does not qualify as a "just war" according to Catholic teaching, while answering questions by journalists aboard the papal plane for his six-day visit to Spain.

headlines.title: Thongloun revisits his alma mater in Beijing
headlines.summary: When Lao top leader Thongloun Sisoulith stepped into the dormitory where he had lived in 2000, he found everything almost exactly as he remembered — the same layout and the same atmosphere, unchanged even after so many years.

headlines.title: China, Australia bask in solar panel success
headlines.summary: Electrician James Moore, who installed solar panels on the roof of his Sydney home two years ago, said the green energy move has helped him halve his household power bills.

headlines.title: LVMH growing with the world's fastest-evolving consumer market
headlines.summary: Company connects cultures and societies with retail and commerce to develop understanding and trust in an increasingly complex world.

headlines.title: Dishing up photo success
headlines.summary: Chinese photographers are among the winners at the World Food Photography Awards 2026. The photo competition this year received nearly 9,000 entries from over 50 countries. A total of 12 Chinese entries made their respective finals, including one category winner. (Script editor: Julian Shea, Video editor: Brian Chang)

headlines.title: Chinese car brands make deep inroads into Spain
headlines.summary: BARCELONA — Chinese car brands expanded their presence in Spain's automotive market in the first four months of 2026, accounting for 13.7 percent of all new vehicle registrations, according to official industry data.

headlines.title: CJP founder applied for permission at Delhi airport, got it within minutes
headlines.summary: CJP founder quickly received protest permission at Delhi airport, averting potential unrest among youth over NEET-UG exam issues.

headlines.title: CRPF DG discusses with Manipur Governor on roadmap to eliminate insurgency
headlines.summary: Kuki-Zo groups in Manipur hold a 'coffin rally' for victims, while CRPF chief reviews security amid ongoing violence.

headlines.title: Accused can't be denied access to documents forming part of chargesheet: Supreme Court
headlines.summary: Supreme Court rules that accused must access chargesheet documents to ensure fair trial rights are upheld.

headlines.title: Ahead of INDIA bloc meeting, CPI(M) asks Congress to clarify on Kerala campaign allegations
headlines.summary: CPI(M) urges Congress to clarify Kerala campaign allegations ahead of the June 8 INDIA bloc meeting to ensure Opposition unity.

headlines.title: NEET-UG 2026: NTA dismisses claims of re-exam paper 'leak' or ‘sale’, warns of action
headlines.summary: NTA rejects NEET-UG 2026 re-exam paper leak claims as false and warns of strict action against misinformation spreaders.

headlines.title: US eyes Iranian assets for Gulf allies' reconstruction, source says
headlines.summary: Reuters: US eyes Iranian assets for Gulf allies' reconstruction, source says.

headlines.title: North Korea reaffirms nuclear status a day before Chinese president's visit
headlines.summary: Reuters: North Korea reaffirms nuclear status a day before Chinese president's visit.

headlines.title: Missing US student found dead near Kyoto, Japan, mother says
headlines.summary: Reuters: Missing US student found dead near Kyoto, Japan, mother says.

headlines.title: White House AI policy adviser Krishnan to leave position
headlines.summary: Reuters: White House AI policy adviser Krishnan to leave position.

headlines.title: British royals gather for wedding of Princess Anne's son
headlines.summary: Reuters: British royals gather for wedding of Princess Anne's son.

hackerNews.title: An Ohio Valley 100k-Watt FM Signal Is Severed in Broad Daylight – Radio World
hackerNews.summary: A daytime copper theft has knocked 100,000-watt WDGG(FM) in Ashland, Ky., off the air. Kindred Communications' Mike Kirtner details the near-fatal incident.

hackerNews.title: Tokenomics: Quantifying Where Tokens Are Used in Agentic Software Engineering
hackerNews.summary: LLM-based Multi-Agent (LLM-MA) systems are increasingly applied to automate complex software engineering tasks such as requirements engineering, code generation, and testing. However, their operational efficiency and resource consumption remain poorly understood, hindering practical adoption due to unpredictable costs and environmental impact. To address this, we conduct an analysis of token consumption patterns in an LLM-MA system within the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), aiming to understand where tokens are consumed across distinct software engineering activities. We analyze execution traces from 30 software development tasks performed by the ChatDev framework using a GPT-5 reasoning model, mapping its internal phases to distinct development stages (Design, Coding, Code Completion, Code Review, Testing, and Documentation) to create a standardized evaluation framework. We then quantify and compare token distribution (input, output, reasoning) across these stages. Our preliminary findings show that the iterative Code Review stage accounts for the majority of token consumption for an average of 59.4% of tokens. Furthermore, we observe that input tokens consistently constitute the largest share of consumption for an average of 53.9%, providing empirical evidence for potentially significant inefficiencies in agentic collaboration. Our results suggest that the primary cost of agentic software engineering lies not in initial code generation but in automated refinement and verification. Our novel methodology can help practitioners predict expenses and optimize workflows, and it directs future research toward developing more token-efficient agent collaboration protocols.

hackerNews.title: Ntsc-rs – open-source video emulation of analog TV and VHS artifacts
hackerNews.summary: ntsc-rs is a free, open-source VHS and analog TV video effect. Use it online in your browser, as a standalone application, or as a plugin for DaVinci Resolve, After Effects, and more.

hackerNews.title: Public Domain Image Archive
hackerNews.summary: Explore our hand-picked collection of out-of-copyright works, free for all to browse, download, and reuse. This is a living database with new images added every week.

hackerNews.title: Moving beyond fork() + exec()
hackerNews.summary: Since the earliest days of Unix, two of the core process-oriented system calls have been fork() [...]

hackerNews.title: Meta confirms 1000s of Instagram accounts were hacked by abusing its AI chatbot
hackerNews.summary: Meta fixed the bug that let anyone trick its Meta AI chatbot into resetting the password on Instagram accounts that didn't have two-factor authentication.

hackerNews.title: Zeroserve: A zero-config web server you can script with eBPF
hackerNews.summary: zeroserve is a small, fast, zero-config HTTPS server. You hand it a tarball of a website and it serves it - over HTTP/2 and TLS 1.3, with hot reload and a tiny resident footprint. The twist is that you can drop eBPF programs into the tarball and they run on every request, in userspace, as sandboxed middleware - rewriting, authenticating, and rate-limiting requests, or reverse-proxying them to a backend when you want it to act as a gateway in front of your app.

hackerNews.title: Nvidia is proposing a beast of a CPU system for Windows PCs
hackerNews.summary: Software performance expert. Ranked in the top 2% of scientists globally (Stanford/Elsevier 2025) and among GitHub's top 1000 developers. Father, husband.

hackerNews.title: Sem: New primitive for code understanding – not LSPs, but entities on top of Git
hackerNews.summary: Semantic understanding on top of Git. Diff, blame, impact, log. Functions, not lines.
